title: PDF Tools
compressDesc: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. All processing happens in your browser.
mergeDesc: Combine multiple PDF files into one document. Drag and drop to reorder.
splitDesc: Extract specific pages from a PDF. Enter page ranges like 1-3,5,7-9.
img2pdfDesc: Convert JPG, PNG, or WebP images into a single PDF document.
pdf2imgDesc: Convert each page of a PDF into PNG images.
maxSizeNote: Max file size: 20MB per file. Files are processed entirely in your browser.
seoDescription: Extract text content from PDF files, count pages, and analyze PDF metadata. Upload a PDF file to extract text, count words, characters, and paragraphs. This free PDF text extractor and analyzer for document processing.
